channel.title: Milanjovanovic.tech on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Milanjovanovic.tech on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Union Types Are Finally Coming to C#
item.description: For years we faked union types with marker interfaces, base classes, and the OneOf library. C# 15 finally bakes them into the language - and here's a quick tour of what they look like and why I think they're a big deal. Link to article: https://www.milanjovanovic.tech/blog/union-types-are-finally-coming-to-csharp

item.title: How to Scale Long-Running API Requests
item.description: When a single API call takes minutes to finish, it punishes both your users and your server. Here's the progression I walk through to turn long-running endpoints into something responsive, scalable, and operable - and when to reach for managed cloud services instead. Link to article: https://www.milanjovanovic.tech/blog/how-to-scale-long-running-api-requests
